input.headline: Tell us: have you ever received a terrible Secret Santa?

raw.headline: Tell us: have you ever received a terrible Secret Santa?

winner: Why was the Secret Santa party at the zoo such a disaster? Because everyone kept stealing each other's pandas!

candidates.text: Every year at the office party, I'm the one who gets stuck with a 'Terrible Secret Santa.' This time, though, I decided to take revenge - I became this year's Terrible Secret Santa!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a twist, showing revenge through becoming the Terrible Secret Santa. It's specific and concise but lacks some surprise and could be more humorous with a punchier ending."}

candidates.text: Why don't secret santas ever play hide and seek? Because they always get stuck in the same closet!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and surprise. The pun on 'closet' is weak and not clearly tied to the concept of a terrible Secret Santa."}

candidates.text: Why was the Secret Santa party at the zoo such a disaster? Because everyone kept stealing each other's pandas!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the panda twist, but 'stealing pandas' is a weak pun and lacks specificity or surprise."}

candidates.text: Why was the Secret Santa party at the zoo so chaotic? Because everyone was gorilla-fied!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the wordplay on 'gorilla-fied,' but it lacks specificity and doesn't clearly tie back to the idea of a terrible Secret Santa experience."}

candidates.text: Every year, I wonder if this will be the one where I get a decent Secret Santa.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relatable and has a mild twist, but lacks surprise and specificity. It's more of a generic observation than a humorous punchline."}
